findings.description: The fully-qualified class name `nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler` — as it actually appears in the XML configuration code examples in s3 — is absent from s3 hints. The document header declares `nablarch.fw.handler.HttpErrorHandler`, but the concrete DI XML uses `nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler`. A user searching for this XML class name would not be routed to this section.
findings.source_evidence: XML examples in 設定項目・拡張ポイント: `<component class="nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpErrorHandler">`. Document class name declaration: `nablarch.fw.handler.HttpErrorHandler`.
